info.name: Customer Opinions API
info.description: Postman/Apidog collection for Customer Opinions API endpoints. All endpoints are public (no authentication required).

header.description: Language code: en or ar (optional, defaults to en)

query.description: Number of items per page (optional, default: 15)

request.description:
Get all customer opinions.

**Authentication:** Not required (public endpoint)

**Query Parameters (all optional):**
- `min_rate`: Filter by minimum rating (1-5). Returns only opinions with rating >= min_rate
- `per_page`: Number of items per page (default: 15)

**Response includes:**
- Paginated list of customer opinions
- Each opinion includes: id, name (translated), name_en, name_ar, description (translated), description_en, description_ar, image, rate (1-5), timestamps

response.name: Success Response
response.body:
{

header.description: Language code: en or ar (optional, defaults to en)

request.description:
Get a single customer opinion by ID.

**Authentication:** Not required (public endpoint)

**Path Parameters:**
- `id` (integer, required): The customer opinion ID

**Response includes:**
- Customer opinion details: id, name (translated), name_en, name_ar, description (translated), description_en, description_ar, image, rate (1-5), timestamps

response.name: Success Response
response.body:
